blocks.text: Quarterly Newsletter from National Informatics Centre

The image is a vintage-style educational illustration or magazine cover page titled 'Role of NIC in the Election Process'. The background features a large, concentric circular design in shades of orange, blue, and green. The central illustration depicts a scene of an election: a person is shown dropping a ballot into a ballot box, while another person stands nearby. To the left, a group of people is gathered around a table, appearing to be in a discussion or voting booth. In the bottom center, a vintage computer monitor and keyboard are illustrated. Text at the bottom right identifies the source as 'THIS ISSUE BRINGS TO YOU: Financial Management Informatics Project A Profile of the Lakshadweep Centre ..... and all other regular features.'
